description.value:
Far-north survival litany stitched into padding — the people of Hvitvidde do not fear the cold; they write litanies into their garments reminding the cold that it does not belong here, and the cold, eventually, agrees.

Effect: You have cold immunity 10, and you ignore mundane environmental cold effects (extreme weather, frozen terrain, ice water, and similar hazards).

Rules: Damage Immunity.

project.prerequisites: A suit of armor of exceptional quality; white fur or wool from Hvitvidde, never touched by salt or fire
project.source: Far-north survival litany stitched into padding (Hvitviddemål)
